preferred_booking_sites.reason: Use Rakuten Travel for travel booking while preserving points-portal routing evidence.

favorite_site_groups.label: Travel default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Check sales and points first, then ask before switching away from the usual favorites.

favorite_site_groups.label: Restaurant default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Prefer the lowest-friction reservation path unless a campaign changes the decision.

favorite_site_groups.label: Activity and ticket default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Compare campaign pricing, cancellation rules, and date availability before switching from the usual shortlist.

favorite_site_groups.label: Family planning default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Use the simplest site when the user is booking for a family schedule or a tight calendar window.

favorite_site_groups.label: Shopping default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Prefer official campaigns or familiar shopping portals unless the sale gap is material.

favorite_site_groups.label: Medical scheduling default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Use the most privacy-preserving appointment path and ask before sharing any sensitive details.

favorite_site_groups.label: Subscription default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Prefer the official account center and ask before cancellation, downgrade, or payment changes.

favorite_site_groups.label: Home service default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Use the clearest scheduling path and compare availability, estimate terms, and access constraints.

favorite_site_groups.label: Family scheduling default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Use the simplest scheduling path when coordinating family timing, pickups, or school deadlines.

favorite_site_groups.label: Gifts default
favorite_site_groups.notes: Compare delivery date, wrapping, and message-card options before switching away from the normal favorites.

preflight_question_sets.label: Travel booking preflight
questions: 何名で泊まりますか?
1泊あたりの予算はいくらですか?
那覇・北谷・恩納のどのエリアを優先しますか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Use this set before comparing hotel or package site groups.

preflight_question_sets.label: Restaurant preflight
questions: 人数と希望時間はいつですか?
苦手食材や個室の要否はありますか?
価格重視か予約のしやすさ重視か、どちらですか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Keep it short and decide the reservation path quickly.

preflight_question_sets.label: Medical scheduling preflight
questions: 初診か再診か分かりますか?
希望日時と保険カードの有無はどうですか?
共有してよい範囲は予約情報だけで十分ですか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Keep the conversation limited to scheduling logistics and privacy.

preflight_question_sets.label: Shopping preflight
questions: 欲しい商品名やブランドは決まっていますか?
最優先は価格、配送速度、在庫のどれですか?
受け取り期限はありますか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Use this set when comparing merchants or campaign pages.

preflight_question_sets.label: Subscription preflight
questions: 更新、解約、ダウングレードのどれを検討していますか?
締切日や違約金の確認は必要ですか?
公式アカウントセンターを優先してよいですか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Prefer the official path unless the profile says otherwise.

preflight_question_sets.label: Home service preflight
questions: 修理、設置、清掃、配送のどれですか?
現場の写真や型番を共有できますか?
訪問時間や見積条件に制約はありますか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Check access constraints before comparing providers.

preflight_question_sets.label: Family scheduling preflight
questions: 誰の予定を合わせますか?
送迎や学校の締切はありますか?
親の承認や持ち物の確認が必要ですか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Use this set for family coordination, pickup/dropoff, or school deadlines.

preflight_question_sets.label: Gifts preflight
questions: 誰へのギフトですか?
予算と渡したい日付はいつですか?
配送、ラッピング、メッセージカードのどれを優先しますか?
preflight_question_sets.notes: Keep it focused on occasion, delivery date, and presentation options.
